calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-05-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:09am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Sylvia Krawec appears in pro per. Respondent, Rodney Cella appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

Appellant requests continuance. Respondent does not stipulate to a continuance.
9:19am, case is set aside until later this morning.

12:02pm - Matter is resumed.

EXHA (1) Trial Brief
EXHR (A) Outline of facts

12:50pm
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Judgment Entered
